title: Zoro’s Wounds Reopen
description: On pages 4–7, zoro’s wounds reopen focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Nami, Usopp as zoro fights Hatchan while still badly wounded, proving his will against a powerful fish-man swordsman.
scene: On pages 4–7, zoro’s wounds reopen focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Nami, Usopp as zoro fights Hatchan while still badly wounded, proving his will against a powerful fish-man swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll forgive you since it's only hair! The important thing is I'm still alive!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Your life will be cut short if you look somewhere else!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: A damn fish shouldn't be going against a cook!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Did you know, Roronoa Zoro? That I'm quite strong against swordsmen!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you understand what I mean?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Naked sword catch- ing tech- nigue!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I don't have time to play around with you!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
